product_name: Dear Zoo Lift the Flap 40th Anniversary Edition
product_description_under_30_words: A sturdy Dear Zoo board book with big animal flaps to lift, sized for shared looking when babble and pointing start to join the page on the sofa.
ember_verdict: Talk stretches past coos now, and animal flaps give a clear pause plus a reveal to name together. Keep turns short on the sofa so the book stays a chat, not a chew marathon. Stop while the look still feels friendly and close the covers.
rank_rationale: #1: clearest UK flap classic for early naming and turn-taking at 4–6m.
why_it_fits: Shared looking and early chat at 4–6m.
gift_note: Good gift if library copy not already loved.
ownership_note: Families often own several board books already — ask first.
safety_notes: Awake shared reading only; not for the cot.
substitute_if_unavailable: Another Top pick on this card
buying_factor_memo: Shared-chat fit first, then interaction type (flap, slider, texture), then UK review depth, then brand cap (max two per brand), then live buyability. Body-first titles deferred to the parts-of-me card where possible.

best_for_tag: Best for spot the dog flaps
